content:
MODULE: cosmos.integration.vtuber.avatar_controller
FILE: cosmos/integration/vtuber/avatar_controller.py (941 lines)
CATEGORY: integration

DESCRIPTION: Avatar Controller - Multi-backend avatar rendering system
Supports: Live2D (live2d-py), VTube Studio (pyvts), Neural (MuseTalk), WebGL

CLASSES:
- AvatarBackend(Enum): Supported avatar rendering backends
- AvatarState: Current state of the avatar
  Methods: def to_dict(self) -> Dict[str, Any]
- AvatarConfig: Configuration for avatar system
- AvatarController: Multi-backend avatar controller for Cosmos VTuber

Handles:
- Avatar model loadi
  Methods: async def initialize(self) -> bool
  Methods: async def update_state(self, new_state: AvatarState, immediate: bool=False)
  Methods: async def set_viseme(self, viseme: str, intensity: float=1.0)
  Methods: async def set_expression(self, emotion: str, intensity: float=1.0)
  Methods: async def start_speaking(self)
  Methods: async def stop_speaking(self)
  Methods: async def render_frame(self) -> Optional[np.ndarray]
  Methods: async def run_loop(self, frame_callback: Callable[[np.ndarray], None])
